## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you considered.

## Configuration / API Impact

Explain whether this changes plugin configuration or behavior.

## Additional Context

Add examples, references, or implementation ideas.
